productDisplayName: Lotto Women's Cross Color Beige Black Flip Flop
description: Get ready for that long overdue trip to the beautiful woodlands. lotto brings to you Cross Colour, the perfect floater for your trip. Soft and cushy, the slippers help relax your tired feet and bring back the spring in your gait in style.Upper Synthetic thong straps for light weight durability and better Fit Metallic strip along the thong straps for funky style Comfortable toe separator Midsole Soft, cushy footbed for soft feel and maximum comfort Printed footbed for style Outsole TPR outsole in multi-directional pattern for good grip and traction on all surfaces shoe careDo not machine washRub with wet cloth to remove dirtDo not store in direct sunlight
